# Stay Roanoke

> Stay Roanoke is a short-term and furnished vacation rental company based in Roanoke, Virginia. We manage 50+ personally vetted properties in Roanoke and Salem, VA, and offer partner listings for independently managed homes.

Stay Roanoke provides direct-book furnished rentals in the Roanoke and Salem, Virginia area — no Airbnb markup, no middleman. Every property is locally managed, personally inspected, and stocked for guest comfort. We serve leisure travelers, remote workers, traveling professionals, and extended-stay guests.

## What We Offer

- Furnished short-term rentals in Roanoke, VA
- Furnished short-term rentals in Salem, VA
- Pet-friendly vacation rentals in Roanoke
- Extended stays and monthly rentals (30–89 nights) with discounted rates
- Partner listings: independently managed properties marketed through the Stay Roanoke platform

## Key Facts

- 50+ properties across Roanoke and Salem, Virginia
- Minimum stay: 2 nights
- Maximum stay: 89 consecutive nights
- Check-in: 4:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
- All properties include: high-speed WiFi, in-unit washer/dryer, fully stocked kitchen, linens and towels
- Pet-friendly properties available (fee applies, starts at $79/stay)
- Smart lock keyless entry at all properties — no key pickup required
- Guest age minimum: 21 years old with valid photo ID

## Pricing & Policies

- Best rate guaranteed when booking direct at stayroanoke.com
- Cancellation: full refund if cancelled 7+ days before check-in
- Cancellations within 7 days: 50% fee applies
- Bookings made within 10 days of check-in are non-refundable
- Pet fee: starts at $79, varies by property
- Quiet hours: 10:00 PM – 7:00 AM
- No parties or events without prior written approval
- Strictly non-smoking (including vaping and cannabis)

## Location

Roanoke, Virginia sits at the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Stay Roanoke properties are close to:
- McAfee Knob and the Appalachian Trail
- The Blue Ridge Parkway
- Carvins Cove Natural Reserve
- Mill Mountain Star and Park
- Virginia wine country
- Downtown Roanoke restaurants, breweries, and shops
- Roanoke River Greenway (20+ miles of paved trail)

## Contact

- Website: https://stayroanoke.com
- Email: info@stayroanoke.com
- Phone/Text: (540) 732-7151

## Pages

- [Home](https://stayroanoke.com/): Browse all available properties
- [Search](https://stayroanoke.com/search): Filter and book properties by dates, guests, and pet needs
- [FAQ](https://stayroanoke.com/faq): Answers to common questions about booking, check-in, policies, and stays
- [List Your Property](https://stayroanoke.com/list-your-property): Property management and partner listing information for owners
- [Partner Listings](https://stayroanoke.com/partners): Independently managed properties marketed through Stay Roanoke
- [Local Guide](https://stayroanoke.com/blog): Travel guides, local recommendations, and things to do in Roanoke
- [Terms & Conditions](https://stayroanoke.com/terms): Full rental policies and guest agreement
- [Furnished Rentals in Roanoke, VA](https://stayroanoke.com/furnished-rentals-roanoke-va): Fully furnished, move-in ready homes for short and extended stays
- [Pet-Friendly Rentals in Roanoke, VA](https://stayroanoke.com/pet-friendly-rentals-roanoke-va): Dog-welcoming properties near trails, parks, and outdoor recreation
- [Monthly Rentals in Roanoke, VA](https://stayroanoke.com/monthly-rentals-roanoke-va): Extended stays of 30–89 nights with discounted monthly rates and utilities included
- [Vacation Rentals in Salem, VA](https://stayroanoke.com/vacation-rentals-salem-va): Furnished homes in Salem, VA — adjacent to Roanoke, close to Blue Ridge attractions
